6676a21d.title: Jessica Monette: Root Me in the Soil, in the Wake
6676a21d.description: New exhibition at SCU's de Saisset Museum exploring family, memory, and what stays with us. Free to visit.

9c48ddf1.description: Exhibition at SJSU's Thompson Gallery exploring language and technology.
